Specialty lipid actives for scalp penetration

notes: Lucas Meyer Cosmetics (part of Clariant) is a French cosmetic active ingredient specialist with a strong portfolio of hair and scalp care actives. As a key distributor of Capixyl™, they provide one of the most clinically validated hair growth actives on the market, combining a biomimetic peptide with red clover extract rich in biochanin A for comprehensive hair growth support. Their lipid-based delivery systems enhance the penetration and efficacy of hair care actives into the scalp and hair follicle, making them a strategic partner for premium hair care formulations.
